name: Volcano Hybrid Filling Chamber
summary: The filling chamber is designed specifically for use with the Volcano Hybrid desktop vaporiser, allowing for vaporisation of both herbs and liquids.
description: The filling chamber is designed specifically for use with the Volcano Hybrid desktop vaporiser, allowing for vaporisation of both herbs and liquids. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
